revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{デフォルトソート:みなみあるふす}} [[Category:日本の山地]] [[Category:中部地方の地理]]」
注意
体裁を調整。
カテゴリ整理
[[Category:日本の生物圏保護区]]を追加 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
[[Category:日本の生物圏保護区]]を除去 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
added [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after mountain ranges]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
revision.text:
{{commonscat|Akaishi Mountains}} *The '''[[Akaishi Mountains]]''' — a [[mountain range]] of the scenic [[Japanese Alps]] group, located on central [[Honshu]], [[Japan]]. {{-}}
[[Category:Japan Alps]] [[Category:Mountain ranges of Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:Mountain ranges of Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Mountain ranges of Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after mountain ranges]]

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/92678533#自らの名を冠したカテゴリ系カテゴリの改名および貼り替え|Bot作業依頼]]: [[Category‐ノート:自らの名を冠したカテゴリ#当系統下のメタカテゴリの改名および指標別分類への移管提案|自らの名を冠したカテゴリ系カテゴリの改名および貼り替え]] (Category:山地別のトピックス) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
revision.text:
{{commonscat|Akaishi Mountains}} *The '''[[Akaishi Mountains]]''' — a [[mountain range]] of the scenic [[Japanese Alps]] group, located on central [[Honshu]], [[Japan]]. {{-}}
[[Category:Japan Alps]] [[Category:Mountain ranges of Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:Mountain ranges of Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Mountain ranges of Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after mountain ranges]]

revision.comment: fixing the uncategorized categories error
revision.text:
{{commonscat|Akaishi Mountains}} *The '''[[Akaishi Mountains]]''' — a [[mountain range]] of the scenic [[Japanese Alps]] group, located on central [[Honshu]], [[Japan]]. {{-}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Japan Alps]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Mountain ranges of Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Mountain ranges of Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Mountain ranges of Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Wikipedia categories named after mountain ranges]]

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="

Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "

Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{commonscat|Akaishi Mountains}} * The '''[[Akaishi Mountains]]''' — a [[mountain range]] of the scenic [[Japanese Alps]] group, located on central [[Honshu]], [[Japan]]. {{-}}
[[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]] [[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]] [[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]] [[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]] [[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]]
[[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]][[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]] [[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]] [[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]] [[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]] [[en:Category:Akaishi Mountains]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]] [[Category:Japan Alps]] [[Category:Mountain ranges of Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:Mountain ranges of Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Mountain ranges of Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after mountain ranges]] [[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"

Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
